title: KiCAD Prism Portfolio Metadata
description: Optional portfolio block that can be embedded inside a project's .prism.json. Importing the repository is still enough for auto-detection; this schema only overrides presentation details.

project_name.description: Human-friendly project title shown in Prism and the portfolio.

description.description: Short project description used in project lists and overview cards.

order.description: Optional sort priority for the landing bench.

featured.description: Marks the project as preferred for portfolio surfaces.

summary.description: Portfolio-facing summary shown in overview and bench callouts.

tags.description: Short portfolio tags for overview chips.

modelPath.description: Relative path to the GLB/STEP model inside the repository. If omitted, KiCAD Prism auto-detects the first model in Design-Outputs/3DModel or Design-Outputs.

thumbnailPath.description: Relative path to the preferred thumbnail image. If omitted, KiCAD Prism auto-detects images from assets/thumbnail or similar folders.
